content: We can adapt the explicit vocabulary teaching framework from high school English reflexion (spelling/meaning learning) to design a structured scaffolding for LLM self-reflection, where LLMs practice explicitly mapping their spelling of reasoning steps to correct output meanings the same way students learn to map the spelling 'reflexion' to its core definitions of reflection and self-evaluation. This creates a supervised, incremental self-reflection training pipeline instead of the current unspecified, ad-hoc self-reflection prompts most LLMs use.
